description: The matchRoute function has complex nested conditions that could be simplified for better readability.
suggested_fix: Consider breaking down the nested if statements into smaller, more focused functions.

description: The unstable_getResponseFromNextConfig function is very long (167+ lines) and handles multiple responsibilities.
suggested_fix: Refactor this function into smaller, single-responsibility functions following the Single Responsibility Principle.

description: Multiple array mapping operations (headerRoutes, redirectRoutes, rewriteRoutes) could potentially be optimized.
suggested_fix: Consider using more efficient data structures or batch processing for route handling.

description: The getSafeParamName function uses magic numbers for character code checks instead of named constants.
suggested_fix: Replace magic numbers with named constants for better code readability and maintainability.

description: The escapeSegment function uses string replacement that could potentially be vulnerable to regex injection if not properly validated.
suggested_fix: Add input validation and consider using safer string escaping methods.

description: The matchHas function has a complex switch statement with multiple responsibilities.
suggested_fix: Consider using a strategy pattern or separate handler functions for each case type.

description: The file is extremely large (2074+ lines) indicating it handles too many responsibilities related to configuration.
suggested_fix: Refactor this monolithic file into smaller, focused modules following single responsibility principle.

description: Multiple complex type definitions without comprehensive JSDoc documentation.
suggested_fix: Add comprehensive JSDoc comments for complex types and interfaces to improve maintainability.

description: Heavy use of complex TypeScript types that could be simplified or better documented.
suggested_fix: Review complex type definitions and consider simplifying or adding explanatory comments.

description: Error handling in route matching could be more comprehensive with specific error types.
suggested_fix: Add more specific error types and better error messages for route matching failures.

description: Regex operations in URL matching could potentially be optimized for performance.
suggested_fix: Review regex patterns and consider pre-compiling or caching frequently used patterns.

description: Inconsistent use of optional properties in configuration interfaces.
suggested_fix: Standardize the use of optional properties across configuration interfaces.
